source: Phase 4 expansion analysis on 218-trade BTC-real + alt-synthetic dataset
vol_30m_percentile_skip_above_history: 0.67 (Phase 4 default 2026-05-22) -> 0.80 (Phase 14.10 2026-05-26): full-universe sweep on 1228 pre-trigger envelopes + V13b score gate + TOD filter showed ETH/SOL/DOGE significantly positive Δ at 95% CI for vol_pct caps in [0.80, 1.01]; BTC/XRP CIs overlap zero. Loosening to 0.80 is the smallest controlled step into the positive-signal zone. See C:/Trading/_tmp_analysis/full_universe_sweep_15m/HONEST_VERDICT.md.
sigma_for_bb_fair_bps_per_min: computed from vol_30m at evaluation time
notes: bps_thresholds ported verbatim (proposed_threshold_bps) from kalshi_btc_gradient_engine/scripts/monitors/per_crypto_thresholds.json. ETH and SOL showed near-zero discrimination in the Phase 4 analysis - flagged for Phase 6 walk-forward recalibration; current values used as-is.
